--- program ---
multi postcircumfix:<[- ]> (Str:D $str is copy, +@indices) {
    for @indices.reverse {
        when Int   { $str.substr-rw($_,1) = '' }
        when Range { $str.substr-rw($_  ) = '' }
    }
    return $str;
}

say '0123456789'[- 1..3, 8 ];  # OUTPUT: «045679␤»
